# SILKLEARN

## About
SILKLEARN turns dense source material into structured, dependency-ordered learning paths for teams. The product is designed for leaders who need teams proficient in complex knowledge without manually designing every learning step from scratch.

## Core Idea
- Input: internal docs, specs, runbooks, PDFs, and technical reference material
- Process: parse, segment, enrich, link, and reconcile the knowledge into a reviewable graph
- Output: a dependency-ordered learning path that leaders can inspect before rollout

## Key Pages
- /: homepage and product overview
- /product: primary product explanation
- /how-it-works: 5-pass decomposition workflow
- /features: feature index
- /features/dependency-mapping: prerequisite graphing and sequencing
- /features/leader-review: human review before rollout
- /use-cases: use-case index
- /use-cases/engineering-onboarding: onboarding from internal docs
- /use-cases/internal-docs-training: training directly from documentation
- /guides: guide index
- /guides/how-to-turn-docs-into-learning-paths: guide on reconstructing order from documents
- /guides/dependency-ordered-learning-for-teams: guide on structured team learning
- /waitlist: early access signup

## Positioning
SILKLEARN is not a generic course builder. The product starts from the source material itself and reconstructs the dependency order hidden inside it.

## Audience
- CEOs and CTOs
- team leads and operators
- organizations onboarding people into dense private knowledge

## Stack
- Next.js website
- Sanity for editable marketing content
- Postgres for operational website data like waitlist capture
